query: INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, videoUrl, readingMaterial, assignment, lessonOrder) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL'), 'Global Economics and Trade', 'Explore international economics and global markets.', 'https://example.com/video/global-econ', 'Global Economics Reference', 'Analyze trade concepts', 14), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL'), 'World History and Cultures', 'Study world history, civilizations, and diverse cultures.', 'https://example.com/video/world-history', 'World History Guide', 'Analyze world events', 15), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL'), 'Document Analysis and Primary Sources', 'Develop skills for analyzing primary source documents.', 'https://example.com/video/documents', 'Document Analysis Guide', 'Analyze primary sources', 16), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL'), 'Social Studies Test-Taking Strategies', 'Learn strategies for social studies questions on GED test.', 'https://example.com/video/ss-strategies', 'Social Studies Strategies Guide', 'Practice timed questions', 17), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL'), 'Social Studies Practice and Review', 'Comprehensive review of all social studies topics.', 'https://example.com/video/ss-review', 'Social Studies Review Guide', 'Complete social studies practice test', 18);
